query: SELECT id, name, totalROI, totalProfit, finalWallet, monkeyValue, lessonsLearned, benchmarkData FROM labSimulations WHERE status = 'done' ORDER BY CAST(totalROI AS DECIMAL(10,2)) DESC LIMIT 3;
